title: taraxacum ovillum
intro: Taraxacum ovillum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum ovillum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
